usage.clearConfirmPrompt: Clear all usage? This cannot be undone
usage.breakdownNote: Cache / video / audio are all subsets of "input" and are not counted separately in the total; cache hit rate = cache / input.
usage.noKeyWarning: ⚠️ No API Key configured —— the perception engine cannot start and will produce no usage. Add and "Enable" a model in the list below.
usage.emptyProfiles: No model config yet, click "＋ Add" to add one
usage.addFormHint: Add model config (if the same Model + Base URL exists, its Key will be updated)
usage.apiKeyPlaceholderExisting: Configured, leave blank to keep unchanged
usage.modelComboPlaceholder: Select or type a model id (e.g. mimo-v2.5)
usage.modelsCount: {{n}} available, search or type directly; please pick a multimodal (omni) model supporting video/audio
usage.modelsHint: Auto-fetched after filling Base URL and API Key, or type a model id directly
usage.baseUrlModelRequired: Base URL and model cannot be empty
usage.apiKeyRequiredBeforeTest: Please enter an API Key before testing
usage.saveSuccess: Saved, click "Enable" in the list to apply
usage.testBadKey: Invalid API key or insufficient permission
usage.testRejectedAuthed: Connected and authenticated, but the model rejected the test request (key is likely fine)
usage.activateSuccess: Enabled, takes effect next inference cycle
usage.modelsEmptyResult: This address returned no model list
usage.editFormHint: Edit Base URL / Model / API Key (leave blank to keep original)
